header.title: Max Membership
header.subtitle: Exclusive privileges for power users
header.noMembership: No active Max Membership. Choose a level below to get started.

badge.title: VIP Badge
badge.description: Earn an exclusive badge that sets you apart from regular users, displayed next to your name across the entire platform. A symbol of your elite status.
badge.highlight: Show everyone you belong to the platform's elite

room_background.title: Room Background
room_background.description: Personalize your room with unique, exclusive backgrounds unavailable to regular users. Make your room a true reflection of your personality.
room_background.highlight: Exclusive backgrounds no one else can access

room_lock.title: Room Lock
room_lock.description: Control who enters your room by enabling the lock feature. No one can join without your personal approval or a password you set yourself.
room_lock.highlight: Full control over your room's privacy

stealth_visit.title: Stealth Visit
stealth_visit.description: Browse rooms and view profiles without anyone knowing you were there. Maintain complete privacy at all times.

chat_background.title: Chat Background
chat_background.description: Beautify your private conversations with distinctive backgrounds that reflect your refined taste. Make every chat a unique visual experience.

hide_reg_days.title: Hide Registration Days
hide_reg_days.description: Hide your platform join date from other users. Keep your personal information completely private.
hide_reg_days.highlight: Greater privacy for your personal data

send_photos_room.title: Send Room Photos
send_photos_room.description: Share photos directly inside public rooms and stay visually connected with all room members instantly.

hide_charge_game_level.title: Hide Game Level
hide_charge_game_level.description: Hide your game charge level from other users. Keep your platform activity completely confidential.

wealth_speed_3.title: Wealth Speed ×3
wealth_speed_3.description: Accelerate your wealth accumulation three times faster than regular users. Progress quicker and climb the rankings with ease.

friend_cancel_alert.title: Friend Cancel Alert
friend_cancel_alert.description: Get instant notifications when someone removes you from their friend list. Never miss any changes in your friendships.
friend_cancel_alert.highlight: Stay informed of every friendship change

hide_top_supporters.title: Hide Top Supporters
hide_top_supporters.description: Hide your top supporters list from other users' view. Keep your financial interactions on the platform completely private.
hide_top_supporters.highlight: Full privacy for your support activity

animated_avatar.title: Animated Avatar
animated_avatar.description: Stand out with an eye-catching animated avatar that draws attention everywhere you appear on the platform.

close_friends_toggle.title: Close Friends List
close_friends_toggle.description: Organize your friends into private circles and control who sees your updates and content. Smarter, more flexible privacy.
close_friends_toggle.highlight: Smart control over who sees your content

vip_discount_30.title: VIP Discount 30%
vip_discount_30.description: Enjoy an exclusive 30% discount on all purchases within the platform. Save more the more you spend.

wealth_speed_5.title: Wealth Speed ×5
wealth_speed_5.description: The ultimate wealth-building feature — accumulate at five times the normal rate and dominate the wealth leaderboards.

exclusive_gifts.title: Exclusive Gifts
exclusive_gifts.description: Send and receive gifts only available to VIP members. Rare, high-value gifts that express your exceptional status.
exclusive_gifts.highlight: Rare gifts exclusive to VIP only

room_list_color.title: Room List Color
room_list_color.description: Make your room stand out in the room list with a special color that catches the eye and increases visitor traffic.
room_list_color.highlight: Your room is the first thing noticed

hide_agent_badges.title: Hide Agent Badges
hide_agent_badges.description: Hide agency badges and administrative rankings from your profile for a more neutral and private appearance.
hide_agent_badges.highlight: A more private and neutral identity

featureDialog.dev_note: This feature is currently under development and will be available soon.
